description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish accented by deep red highlights along the stock and handguard. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It has a collapsible stock for adjustable length, a detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel with a slim profile. The grip is ergonomic, and the trigger guard is pronounced, suggesting comfort and control during use. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, and the muzzle appears to have a simple thread protector or no additional device. Its overall form is streamlined, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black and red tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and standard barrel, featuring ergonomic design and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and barrel alignment, with minimal detail visible except the barrel tip.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the collapsible stock, detachable magazine, ergonomic grip, and iron sights, with red accents visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the grip and magazine less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing similar features as view 1, with the stock, magazine, and handguard details visible.
